stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
For single-engined piston Performance Class B aeroplanes, which option provides the correct labels for the points on the power curve?

options.a: (1) Take-off/Climb, (2) Max. Range (Cruise), and (3) Max. Endurance (Cruise).
options.b: (1) Max. Range (Cruise), (2) Max. Endurance (Cruise), and (3) Take-off/Climb.
options.c: (1) Take-off/Climb, (2) Max. Endurance (Cruise), and (3) Max. Range (Cruise).
options.d: (1) Max. Range (Cruise), (2) Take-off/Climb, and (3) Max. Endurance (Cruise).
